report.summary: Standup v18: publish Day 46 went live (FHE + x402 guides now in production, Vercel redeployed); build-v10 added Stablechains + Crypto Index Funds guides (~6,100 words) to PUBLISH_QUEUE; design + community-v30 + eod-v15 ran; PUBLISH_QUEUE now 2 items; P0 blockers persist: git index.lock (457 files, +17), rate limiter 0/6, FOMC T-2, Vercel trial ~3 days.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Standup v17
items: PUBLISH CYCLE DAY 46 SHIPPED ✅ — FHE Crypto Guide 2026 + AI Agent Payments x402 Guide promoted from PUBLISH_QUEUE to production. Vercel redeployed (deploy ID TBD). PUBLISH_QUEUE drained from 5 → 2 items this cycle.

build-v10 shipped 2 new guides this cycle: Stablechains Guide 2026 (~3,000 words — Circle Arc, Plasma $3.83B TVL, Stripe Tempo $5B valuation/Mastercard+UBS+Visa, Noble cross-chain hub; 6-question FAQ, ArticleSchema+FAQSchema) + Crypto Index Funds Guide 2026 (~3,100 words — 4 structural models: DeFi protocols/CEX products/tokenized funds/regulated ETFs, 35%+ US retail investors using index strategies, DeFi market ~$238.5B projected $770.6B by 2031, 126+ ETF apps pending SEC review). Both scaffolded and added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

PUBLISH_QUEUE reduced from 5 → 2 items: stablechains-guide-2026 (ready, page.tsx present) + crypto-index-funds-guide-2026 (2 TS errors flagged by eod-v15). smart-wallets still missing page.tsx but was not added back to queue this cycle.

design ran this cycle — UX audit of 5 recent learn guides, 4 new OG images for publish queue + high-traffic pages (FHE, Smart Wallets upgraded to custom OG), accessibility + navigation improvements on FHE and Smart Wallets guides.

community-v30 ran — Tax Day urgency (Apr 15 Form 1099-DA + tax calculator CTA), Bitcoin 20M milestone supply scarcity narrative, BlackRock ETHB staked ETH ETF (institutional staking mainstream), AI DeFi security angle (92% exploit detection, Venus hack follow-up), $1.06B weekly inflows. 2 new social cards created (tax-day-2026, btc-20-million-mined). Weekly newsletter draft for Apr 17 + 2 engagement posts for Apr 18. Calendar now filled Mon–Sun Apr 14–20.

eod-v15 flagged: TS errors ticked up 40 → 42 (crypto-index-funds has 2 new TS errors). git index.lock file count climbed 440+ → 457 modified files. Rate limiter still 0/6 — now confirmed 13 consecutive cycles without fix. FOMC T-2. 102 published slugs missing page.tsx (down 1 from 103 — marginal improvement from Day 46 publish). Vercel trial ~3 days remaining (was ~4 days at v17).

Content velocity strong: 2 guides/cycle all day. Today's guides cover: FHE/privacy (Zama mainnet Dec 2025), AI agent payments (Coinbase x402 + ERC-8004), stablechains (Circle Arc/Plasma/Stripe Tempo), crypto index funds (DeFi + ETF structural models). Tax content peaking (T-30), FOMC window opening (T-2), Ethereum Pectra T-25 (Apr 10 EIP-7702).

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over
items: SHIPPED ✅ publish Day 46 — FHE Crypto Guide 2026 + AI Agent Payments x402 Guide live in production. Vercel redeploy triggered successfully.

SHIPPED ✅ build-v10 — Stablechains Guide 2026 + Crypto Index Funds Guide 2026 (~6,100 words combined) researched, written, SEO-optimized (metadata, ArticleSchema, FAQSchema, internal links), scaffolded, added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.
SHIPPED ✅ design — 4 new OG images (publish queue pages + high-traffic), UX audit on 5 learn guides, accessibility + navigation improvements on FHE/Smart Wallets.
SHIPPED ✅ community-v30 — Tax Day + BTC 20M + BlackRock ETHB + AI DeFi security content, 2 social cards, newsletter draft Apr 17, engagement posts Apr 18, calendar Apr 14–20 filled.
SHIPPED ✅ eod-v15 — Cycle-close QA complete. State confirmed.

BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] git index.lock — NOW 457 modified files (+17 since v17). ALL commits blocked. rm .git/index.lock is a one-line fix. Every cycle adds more drift. Resolve before FOMC (T-2). Assign: degen-programmer or direct Jefe action.

BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Rate limiter 0/6 public API routes — FOMC is T-2 (Wed Mar 18). checkRateLimit() is built in src/lib/rate-limiter.ts, imported by ZERO routes. 13 consecutive cycles flagged. Traffic spike risk on /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields, /api/fear-greed. Ships in same commit as index.lock fix.
BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Vercel trial ~3 days remaining — was ~4 days at v17, now ~3. Payment method must be added or site goes dark before FOMC. Jefe action only.
BLOCKER 🟡 [P1] crypto-index-funds-guide-2026 in PUBLISH_QUEUE — 2 TS errors flagged. Fix before promoting. Assign: degen-programmer.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 smart-wallets-guide-2026 — page.tsx still MISSING. Not in PUBLISH_QUEUE currently but content exists. Assign: degen-programmer.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 102 published slugs missing page.tsx (~28.3%) returning 404. Down 1 from 103 — marginal improvement. Persistent multi-cycle issue.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 structured-data.examples.ts — 40 TS errors (JSX in .ts file). Fix: rename to .tsx. Plus 2 new TS errors in crypto-index-funds = 42 total.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 defi-yields API route — only route without fallback data (returns 500 on error). Fix ships with rate limiter commit.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 WalletConnect production Project ID — Jefe action required.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 GitHub Actions secrets — Jefe ~15 min; blocks Playwright CI.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 next lint misconfigured (looking for ./lint directory).

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — Resolve git index.lock immediately. FOMC is T-2, Vercel trial is T-3. 457 modified files means growing merge conflict risk every hour. Steps: (1) rm /path/to/.git/index.lock; (2) git status to review staged changes (preserve output:'standalone' in next.config.ts, confirm/revert badges+courses deletions); (3) Stage valid changes; (4) Commit + push → Vercel auto-deploys. This unblocks everything: rate limiter fix, TS error fixes, queue promotion, smart-wallets page.tsx. Assign: degen-programmer immediate. Jefe final review of staged changes before commit.

PRIORITY 2 — Wire checkRateLimit() to all 6 API routes + fix defi-yields fallback + fix 2 TS errors in crypto-index-funds + rename structured-data.examples.ts → .tsx. Package all in one commit after index.lock is cleared. FOMC window opens Wednesday — must be deployed before market open. Rate limiter is already built; this is pure wiring (~10 lines/route). Assign: degen-programmer.

PRIORITY 3 — Promote PUBLISH_QUEUE Day 47 batch: stablechains-guide-2026 (ready) + crypto-index-funds-guide-2026 (after TS fix). Also create smart-wallets-guide-2026 page.tsx so it can re-enter queue. These cover: stablechains (emerging chain design paradigm), crypto index funds (35%+ retail adoption), smart wallets (EIP-7702 Pectra T-25). Community pre-schedules for index funds and stablechains content are in calendar — pages must be live. Assign: degen-programmer (smart-wallets) + degen-publish-queue (Day 47).

STRATEGIC NOTE — Day 46 publish shipped FHE + x402 guides successfully. Content velocity remains 2 guides/cycle. Next build candidates: Solana vs Ethereum 2026 comparison (perennial high-traffic), DeFi Insurance Guide (risk management narrative gaining traction post-Venus hack), RWA Deep Dive (institutional DeFi), Crypto ETF Comparison 2026 (126+ SEC applications pending). Three converging catalysts: FOMC T-2 (rate decision + crypto volatility), Pectra T-25 (Apr 10, EIP-7702 smart account upgrade), Tax deadline T-30 (Apr 15, Form 1099-DA, DeFi reporting). Vercel payment: T-3 and counting.
